my_thoughts: Student opens with despairing_dependency. 'I am weak, slave, afraid.' The defeated posture. But who's declaring weakness? The one who says 'I am weak' is operating from what premise? That strength comes from outside. My redirects_to_inner_path about to challenge this.
accumulated_insight: Initial observation: Student in despairing_dependency showing vulnerable_helplessness, transferring_agency. Beginning pattern tracking.
visible_response:
The very words you said will do it.
The sentence: 'I can see that I am false' contains all you need for liberation.
Ponder over it, go into it deeply, go to the root of it; it will operate.
The power is in the word, not in the person.
